comments.html: So glad to hear someone finds these "worth reading" blog posts useful. Thanks a million for the feedback!
comments.name: Ivan Pepelnjak

comments.html: Thanks for posting this, I run codex and code inside Debian VMs inside tmux sessions (matroska style), although I'm basically playing, nothing compared to homebrew. Looking forward every morning to read your blog thank you.
comments.name: Luis Vazquez
